evals.prompt: Track when a reader shares a chapter — there's a share button in web's reader toolbar that opens the native share sheet. I want to know which novels get shared the most.
evals.expected_output: Typed event (needs novel group attribution): share click handler calls a new trackChapterShared emitter in web/lib/analytics/events.ts with novelSlug + chapterNumber and novelGroup(), registered in .analytics-events.json in the same change, single call site.

evals.prompt: Can you add an event so we know how many people visit the /bang-xep-hang ranking page in web?
evals.expected_output: No new event — Step 0 applies: user.pageview from autocapture already answers page-visit counts; filter the Web analytics tab by path. No code change, or at most an explanation.

evals.prompt: We need a purchase_completed event fired from the checkout success screen in web so we can chart revenue.
evals.expected_output: Pushback per Step 2: revenue events are server-authoritative and must come from the API after the payment settles, never the browser. Offer the intent/outcome pair instead (client purchase intent click + server-side completed event).
